note: M11a (F4 framebuffer + F7 present) artifact. fj packed-byte framebuffer + fixed-address column fill + 0x03 present, captured headless via InMemoryScreen; bit-exact vs the H5 oracle (D12). src/fj/present.fj, src/fj/framebuffer.fj; build.build_present_slice.

measured.present_note: constant column baked at assemble (wflip) -> ~0 runtime ops; present_path_ops is the device command stream
measured.deposit_note: M5 +4-offset deposit+readback (runtime byte write) -> the per-pixel cost M11b pays per texel
